testcase.name: test_pure_number_not_called_output_equals_source
testcase.failure: tests/test_nontranslatable_segment_guard.py:106: in test_pure_number_not_called_output_equals_source assert client.call_count == 0 E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = <tests.test_nontranslatable_segment_guard.FakeLLMClient object at 0x7fc211506c50>.call_count
